title: Achievements++
description: This adds achievements for your game.
body:
ACHIVEVEMENTS ADDED:



Warden/Deep Dark Achievements:

The Area of the Monster Lair: Enter a Deep Dark Biome.

Advancing through the ruins of Civilisation: Enter a Ancient City and get within 6 blocks of Reinforced Deepslate.

Beast Slayer: Kill a Warden.



Day Achievements:

Halfway There: Spend 50 days in a Minecraft world

The World of Minecraft: Spend 100 days in a Minecraft world



I allow you to use this mod in modpacks.

Also this mod is on Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/achievements-plus-plus
